texto: And there are so much easier ways to destroy a woman. You don't have to rape her or kill her
autor: you don't even have to beat her. You can just marry her. You don't even have to do that. You can just let her work in your office for thirty-five dollars a week.
explicacao: Orientação direta de you don't even have to beat her. You can just marry her. You don't even have to do that. You can just let her work in your office for thirty-five dollars a week. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “And there are so much easier ways to destroy a woman. You don't have to rape her or kill her” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, marilyn-french, there, útil em momentos de reflexao.
